name: prumo
description: Marketplace privado prumo — ecossistema de plugins para Claude Code: prumo-base (foundacional), prumo-secops (SecOps SaaS eGovernment), prumo-devkit (toolkit de auditoria de developer) e prumo-craft (tooling generativo).

plugins.name: prumo-base
plugins.description: Plugin foundacional — vault-toolkit, doctors (prumo-doctor, memory-doctor, claude-deep-audit), gestão de modo operacional e telemetria dos guardrails, helpers bash partilhados e hooks SessionStart (auto-unseal) + PreToolUse (audit-guard + memory-scope). Instalar primeiro.

plugins.name: prumo-secops
plugins.description: Plugin SecOps — Vault, Wazuh, Fortigate, Zabbix, RoR multi-tenant para a Wire enquanto fornecedora SaaS de eGovernment. Assume prumo-base instalado.

plugins.name: prumo-devkit
plugins.description: Toolkit de auditoria de developer — full-audit, security-scan, infra-audit, ux-audit, code-quality, performance-audit, chrome-live (browser ao vivo via CDP, gated), agente local-reviewer e ngrok-expose. Read-only por defeito; correcção opt-in via --apply com gates. Dependência soft do prumo-base.

plugins.name: prumo-craft
plugins.description: Tooling generativo — html-plan (HTML designed em 2 fases com disciplina anti-AI-slop: 8px grid, contraste WCAG AA, real data, 5 surfaces). Standalone, zero deps externas.
